message:
fix(tests): preserve GT_DOLT_PORT in filterGTEnv() (gt-ah9y)

filterGTEnv() stripped ALL GT_* env vars including GT_DOLT_PORT, causing
shelled-out bd/gt commands in tests to default to production Dolt on
port 3307. Preserve GT_DOLT_PORT using the same pattern established in
cleanSchedulerTestEnv() in scheduler_test_helpers_test.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
